signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full Rollout Confirmed on XRP Ledger & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full Rollout Confirmed on XRP Ledger & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin has officially launched across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of April 14, 2026, driving massive capital inflows and record XRPL transaction volumes amid resolved SEC battles and advancing XRP ETF approvals.[2]

signals.headline: Trump threatened "serious consequences" if Musk funds Democrats and confirmed their relationship is likely over after Mu
signals.raw: Trump threatened "serious consequences" if Musk funds Democrats and confirmed their relationship is likely over after Musk's social media calls for Trump's impeachment and replacement by VP JD Vance; Vance called Musk's attacks a "huge mistake" but downplayed them as emotional frustration[2][7].

signals.headline: Elon Musk backs JD Vance as a potential successor, praising him over Trump and urging donors to support Vance, fueling T
signals.raw: Elon Musk backs JD Vance as a potential successor, praising him over Trump and urging donors to support Vance, fueling Trump's reported paranoia and fears of a power struggle[1].

signals.headline: Older reports (Dec 2025) note Musk predicting "12 years" of Trump followed by two Vance terms, amid their public falling
signals.raw:
Older reports (Dec 2025) note Musk predicting "12 years" of Trump followed by two Vance terms, amid their public falling out over a budget bill[3][4].  

No mentions of "Joe Hathaway" or "will Trump" resolutions in results; these appear unrelated or unconfirmed. All items reflect ongoing Trump-Musk-Vance tensions rather than fully resolved outcomes.

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119.6M Weekly Peak | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Spot XRP ETFs recorded $119.6 million net inflows for the week ending April 11, 2026—the strongest since December—with combined AUM nearing $1 billion, signaling institutional momentum despite muted price action around $1.35.[4]

signals.headline: SEC/CFTC Classify XRP as Digital Commodity | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC/CFTC Classify XRP as Digital Commodity | YES | MED confidence**  
XRP was classified as a digital commodity by the SEC and CFTC in March 2026, boosting ETF progress and regulatory clarity, though no new April confirmation noted.[4]

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Heads to Senate Markup Vote Late April | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Heads to Senate Markup Vote Late April | NO | MED confidence**  
The CLARITY Act, potentially enabling banks to use XRP for liquidity, is slated for Senate Banking Committee markup in late April 2026 with endorsements, but no vote or passage confirmed yet—Senate returned April 13 amid uncertainty.[3][4]
